top_signals.note: Surging +15pp recently. SELL-heavy (101/157 correct SELL). Strongest recent performer among enabled signals.
Consistent contrarian BUY signal. Only fires in extreme zones (<20 or >80).
All-time strong at SELL (72.6%). BUT recent accuracy collapsed to 28.2% — see worst_signals.
Stable LLM signal. SELL accuracy 59.4%. BUY accuracy 51.9%.
Consistent regime signal. Stable recent performance.
All-time decent but recent collapse to 39.1%. BUY-only bias in ranging market.
Improving recently. Workhorse signal with largest sample base.
SELL accuracy 58.3% is strong. BUY accuracy 49.9% near coin-flip.
Highest accuracy but dangerously small sample. Recent 3/3 = 100% but unreliable.

worst_signals.note: CATASTROPHIC recent regression (-31.4pp). BUY accuracy all-time 33.2% = structural BUY weakness. Only SELL side was good (72.6%). In ranging/bearish market, mostly voting wrong direction.
93% BUY rate = structurally bullish. In bearish/ranging market, 25.2% recent. Gets 0.2x bias penalty but still dilutes SELL consensus.
BUY-only bias misfiring in ranging market. All-time SELL accuracy 0%. Pre-event SELL logic disabled.
Near coin-flip at decent sample size. Should be disabled or heavily downweighted.
Dropped to coin-flip recently. Part of momentum_cluster with 88-100% agreement — when it's wrong, 7 signals vote wrong together.
Below 50% recently. Also in momentum_cluster — correlated errors.

correlation_clusters.name: momentum_cluster
correlation_clusters.concern: When this cluster is wrong, 7 signals vote wrong together. Single-point-of-failure risk.

correlation_clusters.name: trend_mega_cluster
correlation_clusters.concern: Meta-cluster penalty (0.35x) applied but still dominant. In trending markets, overwhelms other signals.

correlation_clusters.name: macro_external
correlation_clusters.concern: All BUY-biased signals voting together. In bull markets = correct. In bear/ranging = systematic BUY noise.

correlation_clusters.name: fundamental_cluster
correlation_clusters.concern: All disabled/gated but when active, 3 voices = 1 effective signal voting BUY.

ranging.note: Ranging market (current regime) exposes BUY-only signal bias. Momentum cluster degrades to coin-flip.

trending.note: Regime signals designed for trend detection. Pending validation with more samples.

recommendations.title: Investigate Qwen3 BUY-side accuracy collapse
recommendations.description: Qwen3 all-time BUY accuracy is 33.2% — structurally broken on BUY side. Recent 28.2% overall confirms. The directional gate should already force-HOLD BUY votes (33.2% < 43% threshold). Verify this gate is firing correctly.

recommendations.title: Disable or regime-gate econ_calendar in ranging
recommendations.description: 39.1% recent accuracy with 698 samples. BUY-only in ranging market. Should be regime-gated in 'range-bound' regime like crypto_macro already is.

recommendations.title: Tighten momentum_cluster follower penalty
recommendations.description: 100% agreement between 7 signals but only 0.10x follower penalty. Effective 1.70x weight. Reduce to 0.05x or 0.03x to make cluster contribute ~1.30x.

recommendations.title: Add regime-aware signal selection
recommendations.description: In ranging regime: boost news_event (66.5% recent), RSI (56.3%), regime signals. Suppress momentum cluster and BUY-only signals. Different signal weights for different regimes.

recommendations.title: Fix contract violation false positives
recommendations.description: check_layer2_journal_activity fires when journal timestamp precedes trigger timestamp, even though journal_written=true in invocations. Compare journal ts with invocation completion ts, not trigger ts.

recommendations.title: Consider disabling vol_ratio_regime
recommendations.description: 49.6% at 2301 samples = statistically indistinguishable from coin flip. Not providing value. Disable to reduce noise.
